Package in.co.rays.proj4.model

Class TimetableModel

java.lang.Object
in.co.rays.proj4.model.TimetableModel
public class TimetableModel extends Object
JDBC Implementation of Timetable Model. Provides business logic and database operations (CRUD and validations) for the Timetable functionality.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Vinay

  • Method Details

    • nextPk

      public Integer nextPk() throws DatabaseException
      Generates the next Automated Primary Key for the table.
      Returns:
      Integer next primary key
      Throws:
      DatabaseException - if an error occurs while accessing the database

    • add

      public long add(TimetableBean bean) throws ApplicationException, DuplicateRecordException
      Adds a new Timetable record after fetching course and subject details.
      Parameters:
      bean - The Timetable data container to populate the database
      Returns:
      long The generated primary key for the new record
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if an internal error occurs or rollback fails
      DuplicateRecordException - if a matching duplicate record exists

    • update

      public void update(TimetableBean bean) throws ApplicationException, DuplicateRecordException
      Updates an existing Timetable record.
      Parameters:
      bean - The Timetable record container with updated information
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if an error occurs while processing the update
      DuplicateRecordException - if updated changes violate unique constraints

    • delete

      public void delete(TimetableBean bean) throws ApplicationException
      Deletes a Timetable record using its identification bean ID.
      Parameters:
      bean - The bean containing the targeted entry ID
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if an error occurs while processing deletion

    • findByPk

      public TimetableBean findByPk(long pk) throws ApplicationException
      Finds and retrieves a unique Timetable entry using its Primary Key.
      Parameters:
      pk - The unique primary key identifier
      Returns:
      TimetableBean populated bean if found, otherwise null
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if an error occurs while looking up the record

    • checkByCourseName

      public TimetableBean checkByCourseName(Long courseId, Date examDate) throws ApplicationException
      Validates or searches for conflict using Course ID and Exam Date.
      Parameters:
      courseId - Unique ID of the Course
      examDate - Target Date of the Exam
      Returns:
      TimetableBean matching object if conflict found, otherwise null
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if an error occurs while verifying the data

    • checkBySubjectName

      public TimetableBean checkBySubjectName(Long courseId, Long subjectId, Date examDate) throws ApplicationException
      Checks if a specific subject under a course already has an exam scheduled on the given date.
      Parameters:
      courseId - Unique ID of the Course
      subjectId - Unique ID of the Subject
      examDate - Target Date of the Exam
      Returns:
      TimetableBean matched record context if conflict exists, otherwise null
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if any internal database lookup layer breaks

    • checkBySemester

      public TimetableBean checkBySemester(Long courseId, Long subjectId, String semester, Date examDate) throws ApplicationException
      Checks if a specific dynamic context exists targeting Course, Subject, Semester, and Exam Date.
      Parameters:
      courseId - Unique ID of the Course
      subjectId - Unique ID of the Subject
      semester - The Academic Semester string
      examDate - Target Date of the Exam
      Returns:
      TimetableBean populated bean if entry exists, otherwise null
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if processing query fails

    • checkByExamTime

      public TimetableBean checkByExamTime(Long courseId, Long subjectId, String semester, Date examDate, String examTime, String description) throws ApplicationException
      Exhaustively validates cross-parameters to catch overlaps on specific time and description scopes.
      Parameters:
      courseId - Unique ID of the Course
      subjectId - Unique ID of the Subject
      semester - The Academic Semester string
      examDate - Target Date of the Exam
      examTime - Allocated Time Slot string
      description - Detailed contextual note
      Returns:
      TimetableBean conflicting metadata row object if present, otherwise null
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if query execution falls short

    • search

      public List<TimetableBean> search(TimetableBean bean, int pageNo, int pageSize) throws ApplicationException
      Performs dynamic searches for records matching criteria within parameters, supporting pagination configurations.
      Parameters:
      bean - Search criteria parameters bundled inside a mock object container
      pageNo - Current target page window slice
      pageSize - Total record load offset limit per page
      Returns:
      List of matching TimetableBean results
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if search query layer generates problems
